title: lyonia latifolia
intro: Lyonia latifolia, also known as the coastal doghobble or inland doghobble, is a deciduous shrub native to North America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it effective in treating wounds, fever, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Lyonia latifolia include reducing inflammation, fighting off infections, and aiding in the treatment of various health conditions. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, allowing for a range of uses in herbal medicine, including as a topical treatment for skin conditions and as a digestive aid.
